coverage: 100% of all reachable node types across 14 groups and 302 nodes.
parameter_sweep: Authored, 3x3, depth 40, horizontal divider, two vertical dividers, and raised-divider cases match topology exactly. Grid-lines mode is live partial parity at 12,840 / 11,957 versus Blender 13,328 / 12,449.
validation: Modifier named-attribute bindings preserve the source profile's top-edge and inner-wall selections; closed planar Curve to Mesh frames and the evaluated hollow-foot dependency reproduce Blender's complete bin shell and placement.
